---
title: "FEN Economics Workshop"
---

![](images/banner.jpg)

## The Economics of Social Conflict: Historical Insights and New Evidence

**Date:** November 26–2, 2026  
**Location:** Faculty of Economics & Business, University of Chile / Santiago / Chile  

This workshop focuses on research in economic history that examines the origins, dynamics, and consequences of social conflict in a broad sense, encompassing both societal disputes among groups and large-scale armed conflicts.

## Important dates

| Event | Date |
|---|---|
| Submission deadline | 15 August 2026 |
| Notification of acceptance | 30 August 2026 |
| Confirmation deadline | 20 September 2026 |
| Workshop dates | 26–27 November 2026 |

## Keynote speakers

- Michela Giorcelli, UCLA
- Andy Ferrara, University of Pittsburgh
- Roya Talibova, Harvard Kennedy School

## Organizers

- Francisco Pino, Universidad de Chile
- Ariadna Jou, Universidad de Chile

## Contact

For questions, please contact:
[few@fen.uchile.cl](mailto:few@fen.uchile.cl)
